phase1.output:
Rex is eating.
Rex is sleeping.
Rex says: Woof! Woof!
---
Whiskers is eating.
Whiskers is sleeping.
Whiskers says: Meow~
Dog is an Animal? true
Cat is an Animal? true
phase1.explanation:
Inheritance lets a class inherit properties and methods from another class:

Key concepts:
• extends keyword — Dog extends Animal
• Superclass (parent) — Animal
• Subclass (child) — Dog, Cat
• IS-A relationship — Dog IS-A Animal

Benefits of inheritance:
• Code reuse — child inherits parent's methods/fields
• Extensibility — add new features without modifying parent
• Hierarchical classification — organize related classes

super keyword: calls parent constructor or methods
• super(name, age) — must be first line in child constructor

Inheritance tree: Animal → Dog, Animal → Cat

⚠️ Java supports SINGLE inheritance only — a class can extend only ONE parent class!

phase2.errorMessage:
Test.java:8: error: cannot find symbol
        super(name, age);  // Error! Animal doesn't exist in this context
        ^
  symbol: variable super
  location: class Dog
Test.java:4: error: incompatible types: Dog cannot be converted to Animal
class Dog extends Animal {
                   ^
  class Animal not found
2 errors
phase2.explanation:
The Dog class is trying to extend Animal, but there's no Animal class defined!

Super must exist before you can extend it. The compiler needs to see the parent class first.

FIX: Make sure the parent class (Animal) is defined BEFORE the child class (Dog).

In Java, you can define multiple classes in one file, but the parent class must be accessible.

phase3.prompt:
Create a Vehicle class with:
• Fields: brand (String), speed (int)
• Constructor
• Method: accelerate() — prints "[brand] is accelerating!"

Create a Car subclass that:
• Extends Vehicle
• Adds field: model (String)
• Constructor calls super
• Method: honk() — prints "[brand] [model] says: Beep beep!"

In main, create a Car and call accelerate() and honk().
dialogueHints: Constructor: Car(String brand, int speed, String model) { super(brand, speed); this.model = model; }
phase3.openingDialogue: Let's build a family tree! Classes can inherit from each other~ 🌳
